column1: # Maps the FFmpeg version a build actually contains to the FFmpegKit release that packages it.
# These are two different numbering schemes and they do not track each other: FFmpegKit 8.1.7
# packages FFmpeg n8.1.2, FFmpegKit 7.1.6 packages FFmpeg n7.1.5. Package versions here are based
# on the FFmpeg version, because that is what determines behaviour; the FFmpegKit version is only
# needed to name the .aar to download.
# Every value below was read from the shipped libavcodec.so, not from upstream release prose,
# which mentions other FFmpeg versions in passing and is easy to misread.
